meanings.definition: a symptom of some physical hurt or disorder
examples: the patient developed severe pain and distension
This exercise will hurt your back

meanings.definition: cause emotional anguish or make miserable
examples: It pains me to see my children not being taught well in school
Our business was hurt by the new competition
She hurt me when she did not include me among her guests
This remark really bruised my ego
Were you hurting after the accident?

meanings.definition: feel pain or be in pain
